title: Hyundai acquires 100% of Boston Dynamics and plans to integrate the Atlas robot in its car factories
summary: The Korean manufacturer buys the robotics company from SoftBank for $325 million and will bring the humanoid robot to automotive production.

title: Norway bans the use of generative artificial intelligence in primary schools
summary: The Norwegian government imposes an almost total ban on AI tools in basic education to protect fundamental learning skills.

title: Amazon cancels film about Sam Altman after signing a multi-billion dollar deal with OpenAI
summary: Amazon MGM Studios abandons the almost finished film project after closing a $50 billion contract with the AI company.

title: OpenAI Codex updated with task recording, compatibility in Europe and new desktop applications
summary: OpenAI's AI coding assistant adds task repetition functions, support in Europe and desktop apps, improving developer productivity.

title: Anthropic faces regulatory pressure and hires a Nobel Prize winner from Google DeepMind
summary: The AI company Anthropic is involved in threats from the US government regarding its models, while it incorporates John Jumper, Nobel laureate, to strengthen its research.

title: Economists warn that an AI bubble could burst more violently than the dot-com bubble
summary: Experts like Professor Damodaran and market research firms point to warning signs in AI investment, comparing it to the dot-com collapse.

title: OpenAI triples revenue but burns cash, while hidden debt grows in AI data centers
summary: OpenAI reports revenue of 5.7 billion in the first quarter but spends 3.7 billion, while hidden loans are revealed in the AI infrastructure of big tech companies.

title: A 16-year-old SSD survives 1 petabyte of writes, 25 times its official endurance
summary: A SATA II solid state drive from 2009 is still working after writing 1 PB of data, far exceeding durability expectations.

title: Trump presents new Air Force One, a converted Boeing 747 from Qatar
summary: The United States incorporates a new presidential aircraft that originally belonged to Qatar, generating diplomatic controversy.

title: Apple expands Siri with artificial intelligence in new iOS 27 betas
summary: The personal assistant Siri receives significant improvements with AI, including more contextual responses and new features.

title: Surveys show that use of AI chatbots grows but trust remains low
summary: Almost half of American adults use chatbots, although only 16% believe they are beneficial, while consumption of AI-generated news grows with low trust.

title: The 2026 World Cup sparks controversy over detrimental schedules for some countries and problems with ticket resale
summary: While some countries suffer unfavorable schedules due to time difference, fans report failures in the official ticket resale.

title: The video game industry breaks revenue records but faces mass layoffs and legal battles
summary: Despite reaching historical revenue of $201.6 billion in 2025, thousands of workers were laid off and studios like Rockstar deal with lawsuits for anti-union practices.

title: Epic Games and Valve compete with new strategies: faster launcher and delayed Steam Controller orders
summary: Epic Games renews its store with a launcher up to 6.5 times faster, while Valve postpones orders of its controller until 2027.

title: Lithuania and Ukraine develop technologies to detect and neutralize enemy drones
summary: A Lithuanian startup creates an open-source network to detect Shahed drones, while Ukraine mounts weapons on ground robots to hunt Russian infiltration teams.

title: New AI tools automate content creation and productivity at work
summary: Various platforms launch functions based on artificial intelligence to convert data into articles, automate tasks and improve video editing.

title: Philips Hue and Aura present new devices for the smart home
summary: Philips launches Play lamps with TV synchronization, while Aura offers a digital photo frame with electronic ink that looks analog.

title: New cybersecurity threats: malware that steals cryptocurrencies and vulnerabilities in Fortinet
summary: Malware is detected that uses Tor to steal cryptocurrencies on Windows, while CISA warns about a massive vulnerability in FortiGate devices.

title: Claude Guillemot, co-founder of Ubisoft, dies in a plane accident
summary: The co-founder of the video game company Ubisoft died in a tragic air accident.

title: Bobby Prince, legendary composer of Doom and Wolfenstein 3D, dies at 81
summary: The musician behind the soundtracks of the first first-person shooter games has died.
